name: feature-development
description: Develop code, then fan out to automated review and tests. On failure, loop back to developer with feedback. On success, create a PR.

developer.name: Developer Agent
developer.description: Write or revise code based on user instructions or feedback from reviewers/tests.

summary.description: Summary of changes made in this iteration

reviewer.name: Reviewer Agent
reviewer.description: Review code changes for correctness, style, and design.

on_failure.message:
The code review found issues that need to be fixed:

${steps.reviewer.output.review}

review.description: Review comments explaining what needs to change and why

on_failure.message:
Tests failed. Here is the test output:

${steps.test.output.results}

results.description: Full test output including failure messages and stack traces

pr.name: PR Agent
pr.description: Create a PR with a summary of the changes.

on_failure.message:
The PR needs attention. GitHub feedback:

${steps.pr.output.feedback}

feedback.description: CI failure details or reviewer comments from GitHub

pr_url.description: URL of the created pull request
